# bayesDP ![](reference/figures/hex.png)

`bayesDP` implements the Bayesian discount prior approach for borrowing
historical information in one-arm and two-arm clinical trials. The
package supports binomial, normal, survival, linear-model, and
logistic-regression settings, and provides plotting and summary methods
for inspecting posterior estimates and discount weights.

The method adaptively discounts historical information according to the
agreement between current and historical data. See Haddad et al. (2017)
(<doi:10.1080/10543406.2017.1300907>) for methodological details.

## Links

- Package website: <https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/>
- Source code: <https://github.com/graemeleehickey/bayesDP>
- CRAN: <https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=bayesDP>
- Issues: <https://github.com/graemeleehickey/bayesDP/issues>

## Installation

Install the released version from CRAN:

``` r

install.packages("bayesDP")
```

Install the development version from GitHub:

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("graemeleehickey/bayesDP")
```

## Supported analyses

| Function | Outcome / model | Typical use |
|----|----|----|
| [`bdpbinomial()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpbinomial.md) | Binomial response | Event rates and proportions |
| [`bdpnormal()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpnormal.md) | Normal summary statistics | Continuous endpoints with known summaries |
| [`bdpsurvival()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpsurvival.md) | Survival response | Time-to-event endpoints |
| [`bdplm()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdplm.md) | Linear model | Individual-level continuous outcomes |
| [`bdplogit()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdplogit.md) | Logistic regression | Individual-level binary outcomes |

## Basic examples

### Binomial endpoint

``` r

library(bayesDP)

fit_bin <- bdpbinomial(
  y_t = 10, N_t = 500,
  y0_t = 25, N0_t = 250,
  method = "fixed"
)

summary(fit_bin)
#> 
#>     One-armed bdp binomial
#> 
#> Current treatment data: 10 and 500
#> Historical treatment data: 25 and 250
#> Stochastic comparison (p_hat) - treatment (current vs. historical data): 0
#> Discount function value (alpha) - treatment: 0
#> 95 percent CI: 
#>  0.011  0.0366
#> sample estimates:
#>  0.0213
```

### Normal endpoint

``` r

fit_norm <- bdpnormal(
  mu_t = 30, sigma_t = 10, N_t = 250,
  mu0_t = 50, sigma0_t = 5, N0_t = 250,
  method = "fixed"
)

summary(fit_norm)
#> 
#>     One-armed bdp normal
#> 
#> data:
#>   Current treatment: mu_t = 30, sigma_t = 10, N_t = 250
#>   Historical treatment: mu0_t = 50, sigma0_t = 5, N0_t = 250
#> Stochastic comparison (p_hat) - treatment (current vs. historical data): 0
#> Discount function value (alpha) - treatment: 0
#> 95 percent CI: 
#>  28.7334  31.2652
#> posterior sample estimate:
#> mean of treatment group
#>  29.9875
```

### Individual-level linear model

``` r

set.seed(2710)
n_t <- 30
n_c <- 30
n_t0 <- 80
n_c0 <- 80

treatment <- c(rep(1, n_t), rep(0, n_c))
treatment0 <- c(rep(1, n_t0), rep(0, n_c0))
x <- rnorm(n_t + n_c, 1, 5)
x0 <- rnorm(n_t0 + n_c0, 1, 5)

Y <- 10 + 31 * treatment + 3 * x + rnorm(n_t + n_c, 0, 5)
Y0 <- 10 + 30 * treatment0 + 3 * x0 + rnorm(n_t0 + n_c0, 0, 5)

df <- data.frame(Y = Y, treatment = treatment, x = x)
df0 <- data.frame(Y = Y0, treatment = treatment0, x = x0)

fit_lm <- bdplm(Y ~ treatment + x, data = df, data0 = df0, method = "fixed")
summary(fit_lm)
#> 
#> Call:
#> bdplm(formula = Y ~ treatment + x, data = df, data0 = df0, method = "fixed")
#> 
#> Residuals:
#>      Min     1Q Median    3Q    Max
#>  -13.772 -3.582  0.441 4.401 11.814
#> 
#> Coefficients:
#>             Estimate Std. Error
#> (Intercept)   9.8316     0.6865
#> treatment    32.3608     1.1310
#> x             3.1235     0.1288
#> 
#> Discount function value (alpha):
#>  treatment control
#>       0.07  0.3812
#> 
#> Residual standard error: 5.4521
```

## Citation

If you use `bayesDP`, please cite the package and the methodological
paper:

``` r

citation("bayesDP")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`alpha_discount()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/alpha_discount.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Historical Data Weight (alpha)
- [`bdpbinomial()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpbinomial.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Binomial counts
- [`bdplm()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdplm.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Two-Arm Linear Regression
- [`bdplogit()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdplogit.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Two-Arm Logistic Regression
- [`bdpnormal()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpnormal.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Gaussian mean values
- [`bdpsurvival()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/bdpsurvival.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Survival Analysis
- [`plot(`*`<bdpbinomial>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/plot-bdpbinomial-method.md)
  : bdpbinomial Object Plot
- [`plot(`*`<bdpnormal>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/plot-bdpnormal-method.md)
  : bdpnormal Object Plot
- [`plot(`*`<bdpsurvival>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/plot-bdpsurvival-method.md)
  : bdpsurvival Object Plot
- [`ppexp()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/ppexp.md)
  : Compute cdf of the piecewise exponential distribution
- [`print(`*`<bdpbinomial>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/print-bdpbinomial-method.md)
  : bdpbinomial Object Print
- [`print(`*`<bdplm>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/print-bdplm-method.md)
  : bdplm Object Print
- [`print(`*`<bdpnormal>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/print-bdpnormal-method.md)
  : bdpnormal Object Print
- [`print(`*`<bdpsurvival>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/print-bdpsurvival-method.md)
  : bdpsurvival Object Print
- [`probability_discount()`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/probability_discount.md)
  : Bayesian Discount Prior: Comparison Between Current and Historical
  Data
- [`summary(`*`<bdpbinomial>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/summary-bdpbinomial-method.md)
  : bdpbinomial Object Summary
- [`summary(`*`<bdplm>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/summary-bdplm-method.md)
  : bdplm Object Summary
- [`summary(`*`<bdpnormal>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/summary-bdpnormal-method.md)
  : bdpnormal Object Summary
- [`summary(`*`<bdpsurvival>`*`)`](https://graemeleehickey.github.io/bayesDP/reference/summary-bdpsurvival-method.md)
  : bdpsurvival Object Summary
